name: Expansion Chat
description: Improved chat system with channels and muting system.
overview: Expansion Chat replaces the vanilla chat with a feature-rich communication system. It supports multiple chat channels (global, proximity, group, admin), customizable colors, and chat history. Server admins can moderate chat, set up auto-messages, and configure channel permissions.
installation: Add to your -mod= parameter after Core.

troubleshooting.solution: Verify chat settings are valid and the chat mod is loaded after Core.
Consider adding a message cooldown or disabling global chat.

useCases.title: Proximity Only
useCases.description: Disable global chat and only allow proximity communication for immersive gameplay.

useCases.title: Full Communication
useCases.description: Enable all channels for maximum player interaction.

quickSettings.name: ProximityRadius
quickSettings.description: Radius in meters for proximity chat.

quickSettings.name: ChatHistoryLength
quickSettings.description: Number of messages to keep in chat history.
